Name: Chip_100
Description:
This is a helper for Warhammer stats made by Ricu.

It will show you the stats of the weapon you select.

You can also draw a range to see how far it is.
XmlUI:
<Defaults>
  <Text fontSize = "70" resizeTextForBestFit = "true"></Text>
  <Text class = "Header" color = "#c4be45" fontSize = "70" resizeTextForBestFit = "false"></Text>
  <Button fontSize = "70" preferredWidth = "200" preferredHeight = "200"></Button>
</Defaults>
<VerticalLayout position = "-10.125 0.5 -10" width = "2250" childForceExpandHeight = "false" childForceExpandWidth = "false" childAlignment = "MiddleCenter">
  <HorizontalLayout preferredHeight = "100" childForceExpandHeight = "false" childForceExpandWidth = "false">
    <Button fontSize = "60" preferredWidth = "1425" preferredHeight = "100" onClick = "onCountClicked">Show weapon stats</Button>
    <InputField fontSize = "60" preferredWidth = "725" preferredHeight = "100" characterValidation = "Integer" textAlignment = "MiddleCenter" placeholder = "Enter range to draw it" onEndEdit = "onShowRangeEditEnd"></InputField>
    <Button fontSize = "60" preferredWidth = "300" preferredHeight = "100" onClick = "onCleanClicked">Clean</Button>
  </HorizontalLayout>
  <TableLayout preferredHeight = "150" preferredWidth = "2250" columnWidths = "600 800 200 350 350" rowBackgroundColor = "#888888" >
    <Row preferredHeight = "130">
      <Cell><Text class = "Header">Name</Text></Cell>
      <Cell><Text class = "Header">Stats</Text></Cell>
      <Cell><Text class = "Header">Count</Text></Cell>
      <Cell><Text class = "Header">Attacks</Text></Cell>
      <Cell><Text class = "Header">Range</Text></Cell>
    </Row>
  </TableLayout>
  <TableLayout preferredHeight = "150" preferredWidth = "2250" columnWidths = "600 800 200 350 350" rowBackgroundColor = "#CCCCCC">
  </TableLayout>
</VerticalLayout>
